verses.latin_vulgate: In finem. Psalmus David.   Usquequo, Domine, oblivisceris me in finem ?  usquequo avertis faciem tuam a me ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־אָ֣נָה יְ֭הֹוָה תִּשְׁכָּחֵ֣נִי נֶ֑צַח עַד־אָ֓נָה ׀ תַּסְתִּ֖יר אֶת־פָּנֶ֣יךָ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Unto the end, a psalm for David. How long, O Lord, wilt thou forget me unto the end? how long dost thou turn away thy face from me?
verses.king_james: How long wilt thou forget me, O Lord? for ever? how long wilt thou hide thy face from me?

verses.latin_vulgate: quamdiu ponam consilia in anima mea ;  dolorem in corde meo per diem ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַד־אָ֨נָה אָשִׁ֪ית עֵצ֡וֹת בְּנַפְשִׁ֗י יָג֣וֹן בִּלְבָבִ֣י יוֹמָ֑ם עַד־אָ֓נָה ׀ יָר֖וּם אֹיְבִ֣י עָלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: How long shall I take counsels in my soul, sorrow in my heart all the day?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuinka kauvan sinä Herra peräti tahdot minua unhottaa? kuinka kauvan sinä peität kasvos minusta?
verses.king_james: How long shall I take counsel in my soul, having sorrow in my heart daily? how long shall mine enemy be exalted over me?

verses.latin_vulgate: Respice, et exaudi me, Domine Deus meus.  Illumina oculos meos, ne umquam obdormiam in morte ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַבִּ֣יטָֽה עֲ֭נֵנִי יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֑י הָאִ֥ירָה עֵ֝ינַ֗י פֶּן־אִישַׁ֥ן הַמָּֽוֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Consider, and hear me, O Lord, my God. Enlighten my eyes, that I never sleep in death:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuinka kauvan minä neuvoa pidän sielussani? ja ahdistetaan sydämessäni joka päivä? kuinka kauvan minun viholliseni yltyy minua vastaan?
verses.king_james: Consider and hear me, O Lord my God: lighten mine eyes, lest I sleep the sleep of death;

verses.latin_vulgate: nequando dicat inimicus meus : Prævalui adversus eum.  Qui tribulant me exsultabunt si motus fuero ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פֶּן־יֹאמַ֣ר אֹיְבִ֣י יְכׇלְתִּ֑יו צָרַ֥י יָ֝גִ֗ילוּ כִּ֣י אֶמּֽוֹט׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lest at any time my enemy say: I have prevailed against him. They that trouble me, will rejoice when I am moved:
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso siis ja kuule minua, Herra minun Jumalani: valista silmäni etten minä koskaan kuolemaan nukkuisi;
verses.king_james: Lest mine enemy say, I have prevailed against him; and those that trouble me rejoice when I am moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: ego autem in misericordia tua speravi.  Exsultabit cor meum in salutari tuo.  Cantabo Domino qui bona tribuit mihi ;  et psallam nomini Domini altissimi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ בְּחַסְדְּךָ֣ בָטַחְתִּי֮ יָ֤גֵ֥ל לִבִּ֗י בִּישׁוּעָ֫תֶ֥ךָ אָשִׁ֥ירָה לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה כִּ֖י גָמַ֣ל עָלָֽי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But I have trusted in thy mercy. My heart shall rejoice in thy salvation: I will sing to the Lord, who giveth me good things: yea, I will sing to the name of the Lord, the most high.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettei viholliseni sanoisi: minä voitin hänen, ja minun sortajani iloitsisi, koska minä kompastun.
verses.king_james: But I have trusted in thy mercy; my heart shall rejoice in thy salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam Dominus in generatione justa est :  consilium inopis confudistis,  quoniam Dominus spes ejus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ בְּחַסְדְּךָ֣ בָטַחְתִּי֮ יָ֤גֵ֥ל לִבִּ֗י בִּישׁוּעָ֫תֶ֥ךָ אָשִׁ֥ירָה לַֽיהֹוָ֑ה כִּ֖י גָמַ֣ל עָלָֽי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For the Lord is in the just generation: you have confounded the counsel of the poor man; but the Lord is his hope.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä turvaan sinun armoos: minun sydämeni riemuitsee, ettäs niin mielelläs autat: minä veisaan Herralle, että hän minulle niin hyvästi tekee.
verses.king_james: I will sing unto the Lord, because he hath dealt bountifully with me.
